mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kilikili_watch_history (user_id, video_id, watched_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{videoId}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE watched_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kilikili_watch_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kilikili_watch_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
